nodes.context: Political movement with paramilitary characteristics, active in Brazil from 1932 to 1938.

edges.source: Popular Nationalist Insurgency Command of the Large Brazilian Integralist Family
edges.context: The group claims inspiration from integralist ideology originally promoted by AIB.
FIB is a modern remnant group that upholds the strict integralist ideology of AIB.
MIL-B is a modern remnant group that upholds the strict integralist ideology of AIB.
Sara Winter, a member of 300 do Brasil, also sympathized with integralist ideas and worked in the Bolsonaro government alongside FIB members.
